name: Campaign Monitor
description: Track campaign performance, budget pacing, and channel health across launches.
backend_requirements: Campaign model with fields for channel, owner, status, daily_budget, spend_to_date, conversion_goal, launch_at, and notes
Performance snapshot model that stores impressions, clicks, conversions, and revenue per campaign day
GET /api/campaigns with search, status filter, channel filter, owner filter, sorting, and pagination
POST /api/campaigns and PUT /api/campaigns/:id with validation for budgets, launch windows, and channel values
GET /api/public/stats and GET /api/public/featured for landing page summary cards
GET /api/campaigns/:id/performance for trend summaries and pacing warnings
frontend_requirements: Landing page with campaign totals, spend pacing, and featured campaign cards
Browse page with channel filters, status chips, and sort controls
Campaign detail page with KPIs, timeline table, and warning badges
Dashboard page for owners showing budget alerts and recent campaign edits
Admin panel for approving paused campaigns and reviewing overspend risk

api_endpoints.description: List campaigns with search, filters, sorting, and pagination
Return daily performance summaries and pacing alerts

admin_requirements: Admin moderation queue for paused and overspending campaigns
Admin metrics for active campaigns, overspend count, and trailing conversions

admin_api_endpoints.description: Admin overview of campaigns and risk metrics
